title: Admin can sign in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Submit a contact inquiry successfully
description: Verifies a public visitor can submit the contact form with valid details and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Fill "Ava Test" into the name field
Fill "ava.test@example.com" into the email field
Select a valid project type from the project type dropdown
Fill "Looking for a game development quote." into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Bootstrap first admin account via setup wizard
description: Verifies a first-time studio owner can create the initial admin account in the setup wizard and is redirected to the admin login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/setup
Fill "owner@example.com" into the admin email field
Fill "P@ssw0rd123!" into the admin password field
Submit the create admin account form
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the user is redirected to the admin login page

title: Toggle published status from the games list
description: Verifies an admin can change a game’s published status using the list toggle and the new status is reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage games
Click the action to add a new game
Fill "Test Game Publish Toggle" into the game title field
Fill "test-game-publish-toggle" into the slug field
Fill "Description for publish toggle test." into the description field
Select a genre
Fill a valid release date into the release date field
Fill "https://example.com/publish-toggle-cover.png" into the cover image URL field
Toggle published status on
Save the game
Click the link to return to the games list
Toggle published status for the game titled "Test Game Publish Toggle"
Verify the published status indicator for "Test Game Publish Toggle" reflects the toggled state

title: Create and list a new game with publish and feature enabled
description: Verifies an admin can create a fully populated game with cover and store URLs, set it as featured and published, and then see it listed in the games table.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage games
Click the action to add a new game
Fill "Test Game Alpha" into the game title field
Fill "test-game-alpha" into the slug field
Fill "A test description for game creation." into the description field
Select a genre
Fill a valid release date into the release date field
Fill "https://example.com/cover.png" into the cover image URL field
Fill "https://example.com/appstore" into the App Store URL field
Fill "https://example.com/googleplay" into the Google Play URL field
Toggle featured status on
Toggle published status on
Save the game
Click the link to return to the games list
Verify the games list contains a game titled "Test Game Alpha"

title: Browse sections and open a game detail from the homepage
description: Verifies a public visitor can browse the landing page, open a game's detail view from the games showcase, and see the game’s metadata and store links displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the games showcase section
Click a game card to open its details
Verify the game detail view is displayed
Verify the game metadata and at least one store link are displayed

title: View submissions list and mark a submission as read
description: Admin can open the submissions inbox and mark a submission as read so it is visibly indicated as read.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open contact form submissions
Wait for the submissions list to load
Mark the first submission in the list as read
Verify the selected submission is indicated as read in the inbox

title: Edit an existing game and see changes reflected in the list
description: Verifies an admin can open a game from the list, update its description or store URL, save, and see the updated record reflected in the games list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage games
Click the action to add a new game
Fill "Test Game Beta" into the game title field
Fill "test-game-beta" into the slug field
Fill "Initial description." into the description field
Select a genre
Fill a valid release date into the release date field
Fill "https://example.com/beta-cover.png" into the cover image URL field
Toggle published status on
Save the game
Click the link to return to the games list
Open the game titled "Test Game Beta" for editing
Fill "Updated description for edit flow." into the description field
Fill "https://example.com/beta-web" into the Web store URL field
Save the changes
Click the link to return to the games list
Verify the games list contains a game titled "Test Game Beta"

title: Delete a submission from the inbox with confirmation
description: Admin can delete a submission from the inbox and it is removed from the list after confirming deletion.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open contact form submissions
Wait for the submissions list to load
Initiate deletion for the first submission in the list
Confirm the deletion in the UI confirmation control
Verify the deleted submission no longer appears in the inbox list

title: Admin dashboard displays key metrics after login
description: Verifies the admin dashboard shows core site metrics including games and submissions counts.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify total games count is displayed
Verify submissions count and unread submissions count are displayed

title: Jump to games section using header navigation
description: Verifies a public visitor can use the header navigation to jump directly to the games section on the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link that jumps to the games section
Verify the games showcase section is visible

title: Create a new service and see it listed
description: An admin adds a service with icon, title, description, sort order, and visibility and sees it appear in the services list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage services
Select an icon from the icon dropdown
Fill "Automation Service A" into the service title field
Fill unique text into the service description field
Fill 10 into the sort order field
Add the service
Verify a service titled "Automation Service A" is displayed in the services list

title: Delete a game from the list with confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete a game using the list delete action with confirmation and the game no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage games
Click the action to add a new game
Fill "Test Game Delete" into the game title field
Fill "test-game-delete" into the slug field
Fill "Description for delete test." into the description field
Select a genre
Fill a valid release date into the release date field
Fill "https://example.com/delete-cover.png" into the cover image URL field
Save the game
Click the link to return to the games list
Delete the game titled "Test Game Delete"
Confirm the deletion
Verify the games list does not contain a game titled "Test Game Delete"

title: Admin can update site settings and see confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can edit global site settings and save successfully with a visible confirmation.

Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field

Click the navigation link to site settings
Fill Mamak Games QA Logo into the logo text field

Fill QA Meta Title into the SEO meta title field
Submit the settings save action
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: View contact information and social links on the homepage

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Verify contact information is displayed
Verify social links are displayed

title: Edit an existing service and see updates in list
